name: spotify-ads-api
description: Manage Spotify ad campaigns with natural language. Create campaigns, ad sets, ads, pull reports, and handle OAuth — all through conversation.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Spotify ad campaigns with natural language
interface.longDescription: Create campaigns, ad sets, and ads, pull reports, upload creative assets, and handle OAuth 2.0 — all through conversation. Wraps the Spotify Ads API v3.
defaultPrompt: Configure my Spotify Ads API credentials.
Show me a dashboard of my active Spotify ad campaigns.
Create a new Spotify ad campaign targeting US listeners.
